ingredients: 12 large raw prawns, peeled and deveined
3 dried cayenne chillies (or other dried chilli)
Sea salt and black pepper, to taste
steps: Put garlic, olive oil and dried chillies in a small flameproof dish or frying pan over high heat.
When garlic starts to turn golden, add prawns and cook 1 to 2 minutes per side until just pink.
Sprinkle with parsley and a little black pepper and serve immediately with bread.
tips: Do not let garlic burn or it will turn bitter; cook prawns just until pink to keep them juicy.
